name: polyglot-notebook
description: Polyglot Notebook — interactive C# notebook with multi-tab MDI, NuGet, and Chart.js output

scripts.build:kernel:mac: dotnet publish kernel/kernel.csproj -r osx-x64 -c Release --self-contained true -o kernel/bin/osx-x64 && dotnet publish kernel/kernel.csproj -r osx-arm64 -c Release --self-contained true -o kernel/bin/osx-arm64
scripts.build:kernel:win: dotnet publish kernel/kernel.csproj -r win-x64 -c Release --self-contained true -o kernel/bin/win-x64
scripts.build:kernel:all: npm run build:kernel:mac && npm run build:kernel:win
scripts.dist:mac: npm run build:renderer && npm run build:kernel:mac && electron-builder --mac
scripts.dist:win: npm run build:renderer && npm run build:kernel:win && electron-builder --win
scripts.dist:all: npm run build:renderer && npm run build:kernel:all && electron-builder --mac --win
